name: bestdiyminisplits
description: BestDIYMiniSplits.com — static site with self-hosted subscribe API on Cloudflare Workers + D1.

scripts.subs: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT id, email, datetime(created_at,'unixepoch') AS joined, source FROM subscribers ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100"
scripts.subs:count: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM subscribers"
scripts.subs:csv: wrangler d1 export bdms-subscribers --remote --table=subscribers --output=./subscribers.sql && echo 'Exported to ./subscribers.sql'
scripts.views: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM pageviews"
scripts.views:today: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT COUNT(*) AS today FROM pageviews WHERE viewed_at >= strftime('%s','now','start of day')"
scripts.views:top: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT path, COUNT(*) AS views FROM pageviews WHERE viewed_at >= strftime('%s','now','-30 days') GROUP BY path ORDER BY views DESC LIMIT 20"
scripts.views:referrers: wrangler d1 execute bdms-subscribers --remote --command="SELECT referrer, COUNT(*) AS hits FROM pageviews WHERE viewed_at >= strftime('%s','now','-30 days') AND referrer != '' GROUP BY referrer ORDER BY hits DESC LIMIT 20"
